rewritten_requirements: The system shall provide an online platform for managing the buying and selling of artistic creations.
The system shall allow users to view art pieces along with their descriptions, prices, and other relevant information.
The system shall enable activities related to orders, payments, and updates of orders.
The system shall allow admin users to update the information of art pieces, including prices, descriptions, and stock availability.
The system shall enable admin users to generate reports on gallery activities.
The system shall allow customers to place orders for art pieces, including payment options.
The system shall enable customers to delete their orders.
The system shall allow customers to view details of art pieces.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides an online platform to manage buying and selling of artistic creations.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: To provide an online platform to manage the buying, selling and storage of artistic creations provided by creators/other platforms or auctions...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admin users can update art pieces' information (price, description, stock availability).
